meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template Checklist
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on SaaS builds. Use our Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship faster, impress clients, and finish your projects on time.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template eliminates 'project paralysis' by providing a pre-configured, production-ready scaffold that handles boilerplate, auth, and database setup. By pairing this with Claude Code’s autonomous file manipulation, you reduce development time by 70%, allowing you to focus exclusively on high-value business logic and client-specific features.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank VS Code window, the cursor blinking rhythmically like a taunt. You have the vision, the client's deposit is cleared, but the sheer weight of setting up the architecture—authentication, database schemas, API routes—is paralyzing. You are stuck in the 'beginner's trap,' where the joy of building is suffocated by the friction of configuration.

It’s time to stop reinventing the wheel. The Antigravity project template is your escape velocity. By standardizing your stack and offloading the heavy lifting to AI-driven CLI tools, you transform from a frustrated coder into a high-velocity product engineer who ships before the deadline, not after.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the foundation. This creates a clean, modular directory structure that is optimized for rapid deployment and AI-assisted updates.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity standard SaaS template with support for Next.js, Tailwind, and Supabase.

steps.title: Configure Schema via AI
steps.description: Define your database models without writing raw SQL. Use Antigravity's context-aware schema generator to map your client's requirements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Prisma schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application, including tables for Users, Organizations, and Subscriptions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Generate prisma schema based on the provided requirements file'

steps.title: Automate Boilerplate Routes
steps.description: Stop writing CRUD boilerplate. Let the AI generate your API endpoints and server actions to ensure consistent, secure data handling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate server actions for CRUD operations on the Organization model following the Antigravity patterns.

steps.title: Component Library Injection
steps.description: Implement UI components that are pre-styled and accessible. Speed up frontend development by pulling from the Antigravity component registry.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add a responsive dashboard layout component with sidebar navigation and a profile dropdown using the existing theme.

steps.title: Final QA and Deploy
steps.description: Run the automated test suite to ensure no regressions were introduced during the rapid build phase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current codebase for security vulnerabilities and ensure all environment variables are correctly mapped for production.

pro_tips: Always keep a 'context.md' file in your root; Claude Code uses this to understand your specific coding style and project constraints across sessions.
Use Antigravity's custom metadata tags in your components to ensure the AI preserves your specific design tokens during refactors.
Run 'claude chat' with the --background flag during deep work to allow the AI to monitor your file changes and suggest optimizations in real-time.
Before finalizing a feature, ask the AI to 'write unit tests for the most common edge cases' to prevent late-night bug fixing.
Leverage the Antigravity 'hot-reload' configuration to force the AI to update only the modified component modules rather than the entire page tree.
content.next_steps: Once your project is deployed, iterate on the feedback loop by setting up automated user session recording to see exactly where your clients struggle with your UI.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting projects die in the draft folder. With the Antigravity template and Claude Code, you have the leverage to build like a senior engineer. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
